recap: Added bats_mock_oroshi_root to helper, removed OROSHI_ROOT pin block, migrated icons-load-definitions.bats to bats_run_zsh + bats_mock_oroshi_root; also fixed pre-existing bats-lint disable comment syntax in 4 places.

Hardcoded OROSHI_ROOT and OROSHI_TMP_FOLDER in zshenv.zsh; renamed worktrees escape hatch from OROSHI_WORKTREES_DIR to OROSHI_WORKTREES_DIR_MOCK; updated zshenv.bats (rewrite outside-worktrees test, rename inline var) and 4 other test files; also applied same change to ~/.oroshi/tools/term/zsh/config/zshenv.zsh so ~/.zshenv subprocesses pick up the mock var.
Renamed 'no violation when no run zsh' test to 'no violation when line contains bats_run_zsh' and swapped both bats_run_function references to bats_run_zsh in rule-no-run-zsh.bats.
